questions.question: Which Indian has been conferred with the Whitley Award 2021?
questions.explanation: Nuklu Phom, a Church worker from Nagaland has been conferred with the Whitley Award 2021, which is also called as the “Green Oscar Award”. He is the only India to be conferred with this award, which is given annually by Whitley Fund for Nature, in recognition of people who conserve nature at the grassroot level.

questions.question: Department of Telecommunications, functions under which Union Ministry?
questions.explanation: The Department of Telecommunication (DoT), under the aegis of Ministry of Communications has issued a public warning, requesting people not to believe the fake messages regarding the spread of COVID 19 disease due to the 5G network. The DoT has stated the message to be false and scientifically baseless. It has requested the public not to be misguided by the information.

questions.question: “Tianwen-1”, which has successfully landed on Mars, was launched by which country?
questions.explanation: The Chinese spacecraft named Tianwen-1 has successfully landed on the Mars planet. This makes China the second country after the USA to land its rover on the red planet. The landing has been confirmed by the China National Space Administration (CNSA) and has stated that the spacecraft has landed on Utopia Planitia which is a large plain in the northern hemisphere of Mars.

questions.question: Professor MS Narasimhan, who passed away recently, was associated with which field?
questions.explanation: Famous mathematician Professor MS Narasimhan has recently passed away at the age of 88. He was known for the Narasimhan-Seshadri theorem, propounded along with another mathematician C. S. Seshadri and both were elected as Fellows of the Royal Society, London. He was the only Indian to receive the King Faisal International Prize in the field of science.

questions.question: Which tennis player has clinched the Italian Open tennis tournament?
questions.explanation: Spanish Tennis veteran Rafael Nadal beat ace player Novak Djokovic to clinch the Italian Open title, for a record 10th time. In the women’s final, reigning French Open champion Iga Swiatek defeated Karolina Pliskova 6-0 6-0, to clinch the title.

questions.question: India has initiated anti-dumping investigation against the import of which good from China, Thailand and Vietnam?
questions.explanation: The Union Commerce Ministry has initiated an anti-dumping investigation against the import of solar cells from China, Thailand and Vietnam. To boost domestic manufacturing, the Centre had imposed 25% safeguard duty on solar imports from China and Malaysia. Solar cells are the basic ingredient used in the manufacturing of solar modules and Chinese products are sold cheaper than Indian counterparts.

questions.question: Which company received an approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) to take over DHFL?
questions.explanation: Piramal Enterprises (PEL) subsidiary Piramal Capital and Housing Finance (PCHFL) has received an approval from the Competition Commission of India (CCI) to take over Dewan Housing Finance Corporation (DHFL). PCHFL’s Rs 34,250-crore bid has already been approved by the Reserve Bank of India in February 2021.

questions.question: SpaceX announced a new partnership with which technology company, to strengthen use of its satellite Internet connectivity?
questions.explanation: Elon Musk-owned SpaceX has announced a new partnership with Google to strengthen the use of its satellite Internet connectivity. Under the partnership, Google Cloud would deliver data, cloud services, and applications to its enterprise customers, by using Starlink’s high-speed broadband Internet. SpaceX will locate Starlink ground stations and will enable secure delivery of data through Google cloud.

questions.question: Simorgh, which was making news recently, is the strongest super-computer of which country?
questions.explanation: Simorgh, named after a mythical Persian bird is Iran’s strongest supercomputer launched till date. It was developed domestically by Tehran’s Amirkabir University of Technology (AUT), The supercomputer has a performance capacity of 0.56 petaflops at present and will reach one petaflops in two months.

questions.question: Which organizations have stated that “Long working hours” have resulted in 7.45 lakh deaths per year around the globe?
questions.explanation: In a joint research publication by the World Health Organization and the International Labour Organization, published in the Environment International journal, it is stated that Long working hours have killed close to 7.45 lakh people across the globe. Of them 3.98 lakh people died from stroke and 3.47 lakh died from heart disease. Also, it is found that work related disease burden is found to be more prominent in men.
